title: Jujutsu Kaisen
description: A mod that adds powers and abilities from Jujutsu Kaisen to minecraft!
body:
[![Create a server with BisectHosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1bd37251ebccbece86e945ec266a55202664912_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/PcERN)

# **What is this mod about?**

This mod adds abilities from the characters of the anime Jujutsu Kaisen to minecraft!

# **Current Features**

Gojo Satoru's Hollow purple, Red and Blue
Gojo's Domain expansion

# **How to obtain the abilities**

You can gain the respective abilties of each character by killing them in their own structure spread across the world!

# **What to expect**

More abilities will come from the manga and the anime such as choso's piercing blood.
